title: Zen Theme Manifest
description: Describes the themes available for a Zen-enabled site.

default.description: ID of the default theme. Falls back to first theme if omitted.

id.description: Unique slug. Used in URL params and localStorage.

tier.description: Theming level. Higher tiers are more powerful but need more setup.

swatch.description: Visual preview in the switcher UI.

tokens.description: CSS custom property overrides (Level 1). Keys must start with '--' or will be prefixed with '--zen-'.

stylesheet.description: URL to a CSS file injected into @layer zen.theme (Level 2).

components.description: Map of custom element tag names to JS module URLs (Level 3).

generator.description: URL to a JS module exporting generate(seed): string (Level 4).

seed.description: Default seed for generative themes. If omitted, a random seed is used each load.
